name: Terriermon Assistant

signature_move.name: Dai Bacchi Gū
signature_move.description: Enlarges the badge on its chest and hurls it.

description: A hardworking Terriermon that supports Agumon Hakase . It loves learning about Digimon species and their way of life, and telling people what it has learned most of all. In addition to " Petit Twister ", its Signature Move is enlarging the badge on its chest and hurling it ( Dai Bacchi Gū [N 1] ).
